title: kacchanff/agent-playground
summary: 🛠️ Experiment with AI agents in a local sandbox to run, score, and compare outputs without the need for complex frameworks.

title: raydatalab/hermes-smart-router
summary: Semantic model tier router for Hermes Agent — local/flash/pro auto-selected per query

title: gumieri/nenya
summary: A lightweight, highly secure AI API Gateway/Proxy written in Go. Acts as transparent middleware between local AI coding clients (OpenCode/Pi/Cursor) and upstream LLM providers (Gemini, DeepSeek, Zhipu z.ai).

title: temiroff/Blacknode
summary: Workflow framework for AI agents. MCP-native typed graphs, visual editor, Python export.

title: c-vision/UnifiedLLMGateway
summary: A high-performance, standalone Go-based proxy. It provides a dual-interface (Anthropic & OpenAI) so that tools speaking different API formats can share the same local LLM backend.

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: epatel/model-benchmark
summary: Benchmark AI coding models (Claude + Ollama local/cloud) on small tasks with ground-truth test oracles — bug fixes, features, refactors, race conditions & deadlocks.

title: marcossangomes/SmartLLM-Router
summary: 🔍 Optimize LLM requests by routing them to the best models, while leveraging semantic caching and real-time cost analytics for efficient resource use.

title: afterthings7/local-ai-stack
summary: 🔍 Build local AI infrastructure on M2 MacBook Air with zero cloud dependencies, ensuring unlimited usage and complete privacy.

title: redblac/web-youtube-summarizer-llm
summary: 📝 Summarize any YouTube video or website URL effortlessly using LangChain and Groq Llama models for clear, concise insights.

title: code-vygr/local-llm-ocr-ollama
summary: 🖼️ Extract text from images locally using Ollama's LLMs—100% free, offline, and private. No API keys or cloud costs necessary.

title: 09sulka/API-4-Your-AI
summary: 🤖 Build and deploy OpenAI-compatible local FastAPI endpoints with SQL Server 2025 AI integration for seamless AI workflows and secure connections.

title: Intrinsical-AI/rag-prototype
summary: An experimental local RAG-backend modular framework. Ports & Adapters to RAG-Ops & Offline Experiments

title: ntnhan19/smart_media_analytics_cloudforge
summary: AI-powered Local-First Media Asset Management & Semantic Search System

title: rexnzm/MCP-rag-with-Chromadb
summary: 🗂️ Build a versatile MCP server with RAG capabilities, supporting multiple document formats using LangChain and ChromaDB for efficient data retrieval.

title: CorvinLabs/CorvinOS
summary: Self-hosted agentic OS — connects Claude Code, Codex or Hermes Agent to Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Slack & Email. EU AI Act 2026 & GDPR compliance by architecture.
